The question is asking to identify the player who won the MVP award in consecutive years. Since each row represents an MVP winner for a specific year, and the "mvp" column indicates the player who won, we need to group by the "mvp" column to see which player appears in consecutive years. We can use the f_group_column(mvp) operation to group the MVP winners by player to analyze this situation.
The only player to win MVP in consecutive years is Mauro Biello, as he won the MVP award in both 1997 and 1998.
